title: /mod
text: /mod Specifies a model name for Uniface objects that are added when importing WSDL definitions for call-out. /mod= ModelName Used With /sti Parameters ModelName —new or existing model name; maximum 32 characters, starting with alphabetic character. Description If /mod= ModelName is specified, it overrides the default model name, which is derived from the first element of the Model property of the entity. If there is no existing model with the specified name, an application model is generated and added to the Repository. If a model name begins with non-alphabetic characters, they are removed from the name. If the resulting name is null, the name FILLER is generated. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
